subject: TCloud Services Request - BFS - Anthropic Claude Token Renewal
body:
Hi Renata,

BFS is submitting a TCloud Services Request for a renewal of our Anthropic Claude token allocation via AWS Bedrock. This is a renewal of R-04321, which is currently at 80% consumption and projected to be fully consumed within the next 45 days. The renewal request is for $50,000.00 in token spend for FY26 continuation, same amount as the original. POC is myself, Alisha Squires. Intake form is attached.

Please let me know next steps.

Thanks,
Alisha Squires
BFS

subject: RE: TCloud Services Request - BFS - R-05642 Logged
body:
Alisha,

Thanks for the submission. I've logged this in ServiceNow as SNOW-21094, intake ID R-05642. This is noted as a renewal of R-04321 at the same dollar amount ($50,000.00). Routing to Diane Okafor for the proceed/no-proceed decision. Will follow up once we have a green light to move into Discovery.

Best,
Renata Cole
Intake Analyst, TCSC

subject: RE: R-05642 - Proceed Decision
body:
Renata,

Reviewed BFS's renewal request (R-05642, $50,000.00 Anthropic Claude via Bedrock, renewal of R-04321). Same scope and dollar amount as original -- given the 80% consumption flag, approved to proceed to Discovery expeditiously.

Diane

subject: Discovery Call - R-05642 - BFS Anthropic Token Renewal
body:
Hi Alisha, Marcus,

PMO has approved R-05642 to proceed. Since this is a same-scope renewal of R-04321, discovery should be brief -- mainly confirming use case, FISMA level, and hosting model are unchanged. Proposing Thursday 1pm ET. Does that work?

Renata

subject: RE: Discovery Call - R-05642 - BFS Anthropic Token Renewal
body:
Thursday 1pm works. No changes from R-04321 -- same use case (document classification pilot), FISMA Moderate, Managed hosting. We're renewing at the same $50,000 amount because the pilot is continuing into FY27 and usage patterns have been consistent.

Alisha

subject: RE: Discovery Call - R-05642 - Notes
body:
Good call. No changes to use case or technical profile from R-04321 -- confirmed FISMA Moderate, Managed hosting, Anthropic Claude via Bedrock. Same $50,000 scope, pilot continuing into FY27. FYIdea update is minimal. Renata, ready to move into Estimation.

Marcus

subject: ROM Needed - R-05642 - BFS Anthropic Token Renewal
body:
Greg,

Need a ROM for R-05642: BFS, $50,000.00 in Anthropic Claude tokens via AWS Bedrock, renewal of R-04321, Managed hosting model. Same fee structure as the original -- inclusive of SAIC vendor handling fee. Targeting PPM submission within 2 weeks.

Renata

subject: RE: ROM Needed - R-05642
body:
Renata,

On it. Confirming same 3.95% SAIC handling fee as R-04321, and TCloud PMO fee (5%) applied separately at CEBD stage?

Greg

subject: RE: ROM Needed - R-05642
body:
Correct -- same structure as R-04321. Base $50,000.00, plus 3.95% SAIC handling fee, then TCloud PMO fee (5%) applied separately at CEBD stage.

Renata

subject: ROM Complete - R-05642
body:
ROM is complete. Base token cost $50,000.00, plus SAIC handling fee (3.95%) bringing the estimate to $51,975.00. TCloud PMO fee to be applied separately at CEBD stage. Ready for PPM packaging.

Greg

subject: PPM Package Submitted - R-05642
body:
Diane,

PPM package for R-05642 (BFS, Anthropic Claude via Bedrock, ROM $51,975.00) is submitted for QA review. Marcus's FYIdea and discovery notes are attached as supporting docs.

Renata

subject: RE: PPM Package - R-05642 - Feedback
body:
Renata,

Reviewed the PPM package. Please break out the SAIC handling fee and TCloud PMO fee as separate line items in the cost summary -- same transparency requirement as previous packages. Otherwise looks solid.

Diane

subject: RE: PPM Package - R-05642 - Feedback Incorporated
body:
Diane,

Updated the cost summary to show base cost ($50,000.00), SAIC handling fee ($1,975.00), and TCloud PMO fee (5%) as separate line items. Re-attaching the revised package and adding to the next PPM agenda.

Renata

subject: RE: PPM Package - R-05642 - On Agenda
body:
Confirmed, R-05642 is on next week's PPM agenda for Executive Approval. Patricia, flagging for your review -- same-scope BFS renewal at $50,000, straightforward Bedrock token request, similar profile to R-04321.

Diane

subject: PPM Presentation - R-05642 - BFS Anthropic Token Renewal
body:
Patricia,

Presenting R-05642 at today's PPM session. Quick summary: BFS, document classification pilot continuing into FY27, Anthropic Claude via AWS Bedrock, base cost $50,000.00, total estimate with SAIC fee $51,975.00 pre-PMO-fee. Same-scope renewal of R-04321. Happy to answer questions beforehand if useful.

Marcus

subject: RE: PPM Presentation - R-05642 - Approved
body:
Approved. R-05642 is cleared for Customer Estimate Review. Consistent usage and same scope -- straightforward renewal. Good work keeping this moving given the 80% consumption flag on R-04321.

Patricia Nguyen
ACIO

subject: Cost Review Scheduling - R-05642
body:
Alisha,

Executive Approval came through for R-05642. Per process, we need to schedule a cost element review within 5 business days. Are you available Thursday or Friday this week?

Renata

subject: RE: Cost Review Scheduling - R-05642
body:
Friday works. Can you walk me through the final cost breakdown before the call? Finance will want the full picture before I give verbal concurrence.

Alisha

subject: RE: Cost Review Scheduling - R-05642 - Cost Breakdown
body:
Of course. Breakdown: base token cost $50,000.00, plus SAIC vendor handling fee (3.95%) bringing it to $51,975.00, plus standard 5% TCloud PMO fee on top, for a final total of $54,573.75. We'll walk through this in detail Friday and you'll have a chance to ask questions before the CEBD is drafted.

Renata

subject: RE: Cost Review - R-05642 - Concurrence
body:
Thanks for walking through that Friday. BFS is good with $54,573.75 as the final number -- you can move forward with the CEBD.

Alisha

subject: CEBD Drafted - R-05642 - Ready for Review
body:
Howard, Marcus,

CEBD for R-05642 is drafted: final amount $54,573.75, Anthropic Claude tokens via AWS Bedrock, Managed hosting model, FY27. Requesting Program SME + Intake Director review before this goes out to Alisha for signature.

Renata

subject: RE: CEBD Drafted - R-05642 - Reviewed
body:
Reviewed and looks good -- cost agreement section, terms of service, and the 75%-consumption notification clause are all standard. Cleared to send to Alisha for signature.

Howard Liu
Intake Director

subject: CEBD for Signature - R-05642 - BFS Anthropic Token Renewal
body:
Alisha,

CEBD is attached for R-05642, final amount $54,573.75. A few things to note before signing: this is a non-refundable up-front commitment, cancellation requires 1 year written notice, and renewal is automatic unless you notify us otherwise. Please notify us once consumption hits 75% of the pre-funded amount so we can initiate the next renewal before you run out. Let me know if you have questions before signing.

Renata
